items.name: Solver
items.doc: Walks a `PanelNode` tree and emits flat `SolvedItem` rectangles with normalized coordinates.

items.name: new
items.signature: pub fn new(win_w: f32, win_h: f32) -> Self
items.doc: Create a solver targeting the given window pixel dimensions.

items.name: solve
items.signature: pub fn solve(mut self, root: &PanelNode) -> Vec<SolvedItem>
items.doc: Consume the solver, recursively visit the tree, and return all solved items.
